questions.q: According to reports on May 5, 2026, which filmmaker's Monkeypaw Productions recently cut down its development team?
On May 6, 2026, it was announced that Tiger Woods officially withdrew from the PGA Championship, while which LIV Golf player received a surprise invitation?
Which state filed a lawsuit in May 2026 against artificial intelligence company Character.AI, alleging its chatbots illegally acted as licensed medical doctors?
In early May 2026, the World Health Organization investigated a rare suspected human-to-human transmission of what rodent-borne virus on a stranded cruise ship?
In May 2026, the U.S. Supreme Court temporarily blocked a lower court ruling, fully restoring access to which abortion pill through telehealth and mail?
Which of Guillermo del Toro's films was announced on May 5, 2026, to return to the Cannes Film Festival in a new 4K restoration to celebrate its 20th anniversary?
As announced on May 5, 2026, Ray Mendoza is set to direct 'Blood On The Promontory', a Western-drama following five convicts shackled together by what?
Which NHL team won the lottery for the No. 1 pick in the 2026 draft, as reported on May 6, 2026?
A 1.0 release trailer on May 6, 2026, highlighted 'Zagreus' Journey', an ambitious fan-mod that seamlessly integrates the entirety of the original Hades game into which title?
questions.correctText: The 'Zagreus' Journey' mod allows players to explore the original Hades regions and fight its legacy bosses seamlessly as Melinoë within Hades II.

questions.q: On May 6, 2026, which former Disney child star from 'The Parent Trap' revealed she lost 90 percent of her early earnings due to bad financial advice and a British supertax?
